summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of DIRGED Portal after refactoring from monolithic App.js (~2292 lines) to 15 modular components. All functionality verified working correctly - refactoring successful with no regressions.
passed_tests: Navbar displays all 12 navigation icons correctly (Home, Competências, Organograma, Atos Normativos, Capital Humano, Orçamento, Mapa, Gestão Documental, Gestão da Informação, Iniciativas, Prêmios, Projetos Futuros)
EJEF logo in navbar links to external site
Hero section displays with video background, title, subtitle and 2 CTA buttons
Hero 'Vídeo institucional (2024)' button opens YouTube link
Hero 'Explorar' button scrolls to Competências section
Competências section with carousel auto-play and tag cloud marquee
Organograma section displays DIRGED, ASGID, 3 Gerências, 8 Coordenações boxes
Modal: Thiago Doro (DIRGED Director) - opens and closes correctly
Modal: André Borges Ribeiro (ASGID) - opens and closes correctly
Modal: Simone Meireles (GEDOC) - opens and closes correctly
Modal: Daniela Fernanda Santos (GEDAN) - opens and closes correctly
Modal: Marianna Levenhagen (CORCEN) - opens and closes correctly
Modal: Giselle Cesário da Costa (COARQ) - opens and closes correctly
Atos Normativos section with 6 category tabs navigable
Capital Humano section with team photo, 245 collaborators count, 5 expandable cards
Orçamento section with R$ 46.714.391 total, Consumo and Investimento expandable cards
Leaflet map renders with 7 geolocalized markers and working popups
Map legend shows all 7 locations with addresses
Gestão Documental section with 4 stats cards and content
4 placeholder sections (Gestão da Informação, Iniciativas, Prêmios, Projetos Futuros) show 'Em construção...' as expected
Footer displays contact info (email, phone) and EJEF logo
Smooth scroll navigation works between all sections
Mobile menu toggle works correctly - opens/closes properly
All 12 mobile navigation links present and functional
Mobile menu closes after navigation selection
All data-testid attributes preserved after refactoring
No JavaScript errors detected
Responsive design works on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844)
context_for_next_testing_agent: This was a REFACTORING task. The monolithic App.js (~2292 lines) was successfully split into 15 modular components without any functionality changes. All features verified working: navigation, modals, Leaflet map, carousels, expandable cards, smooth scroll. The 4 placeholder sections (gestao-informacao, iniciativas, premios, projetos) intentionally show 'Em construção...' - this is expected behavior, not a bug.
